_notes: GPT-4o: valid evaluation — model returned Ogham Unicode predictions, but hallucinated common genealogical formulae (e.g. CATTUBUTTAS-MAQI-MUCOI-CORBBI) irrespective of input content. CER >100% on freeform because predictions were longer than references.
